DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB_DefaultMeshAssignCustomizer_NativeArray Class Reference
Inheritance diagram for DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB_DefaultMeshAssignCustomizer_NativeArray:

Public Member Functions

virtual int UVchannelWithExtraParameter ()
 Should return -1 if the extra slice parameter is not stored in a UV channel. Should return a value from 0 to 7 to indicate which UV channel is being used to store the extra parameter.
 
virtual void meshAssign_UV (int channel, MB_IMeshBakerSettings settings, MB2_TextureBakeResults textureBakeResults, NativeSlice< Vector3 > outUVsInMesh, NativeSlice< float > sliceIndexes)
 For customizing data just before it is assigned to a mesh. If using Texture Arrays this can be used to inject the slice index into a coordinate in the mesh.
 
virtual void meshAssign_colors (MB_IMeshBakerSettings settings, MB2_TextureBakeResults textureBakeResults, NativeSlice< Color > outUVsInMesh, NativeSlice< float > sliceIndexes)
 
int UVchannelWithExtraParameter ()
 Should return -1 if the extra slice parameter is not stored in a UV channel. Should return a value from 0 to 7 to indicate which UV channel is being used to store the extra parameter.
 
void meshAssign_UV (int channel_0_to_7, MB_IMeshBakerSettings settings, MB2_TextureBakeResults textureBakeResults, NativeSlice< Vector3 > outUVsInMesh, NativeSlice< float > sliceIndexes)
 For customizing data just before it is assigned to a mesh. If using Texture Arrays this can be used to inject the slice index into a coordinate in the mesh.
 
void meshAssign_colors (MB_IMeshBakerSettings settings, MB2_TextureBakeResults textureBakeResults, NativeSlice< Color > outUVsInMesh, NativeSlice< float > sliceIndexes)

For customizing data just before it is assigned to a mesh. If using Texture Arrays this can be used to inject the slice index into a coordinate in the mesh.

Implements DigitalOpus.MB.Core.IAssignToMeshCustomizer_NativeArrays.

Reimplemented in DigitalOpus.MB.Core.CustomizerNativeArrayPutSliceIndexInUV0_z.

◆ UVchannelWithExtraParameter()

virtual int DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB_DefaultMeshAssignCustomizer_NativeArray.UVchannelWithExtraParameter ( )
virtual

Should return -1 if the extra slice parameter is not stored in a UV channel. Should return a value from 0 to 7 to indicate which UV channel is being used to store the extra parameter.

Implements DigitalOpus.MB.Core.IAssignToMeshCustomizer_NativeArrays.

Reimplemented in DigitalOpus.MB.Core.CustomizerNativeArrayPutSliceIndexInUV0_z.
